playbook.intent: A single 1-page report: RAG status, delivered/planned, top 3 risks, decisions needed, EVM headline (if pro tier). Generated once a week, scannable in 60 seconds by the reader.
playbook.scope: A single 1-page report: RAG status, delivered/planned, top 3 risks, decisions needed, EVM headline (if pro tier). Generated once a week, scannable in 60 seconds by the reader.

success-criteria.criterion: Every domain has a defensible RAG score
Decisions section has 1-3 explicit choices with owners

stage.name: Pull the inputs
stage.intent: Gather all the source data before writing.

tasks.task: Pull last week's delivered + planned items
Pull EVM headline numbers if applicable

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the pack covers all required sections.

stage.name: Score RAG

tasks.task: Set overall RAG plus per-domain (scope / schedule / cost / quality)
Document why if RAG changed from last week

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every domain has a defensible RAG score.

stage.name: Draft the one-pager

tasks.task: Use the audience-appropriate template (client-friendly vs leadership-direct)
Lead with RAG + decisions needed (not 'work done')

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the draft fits one page.

stage.name: Decisions section

tasks.task: List 1-3 decisions the reader must make
Frame each as 'decide between X and Y by date Z'

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each decision has a binary or trinary choice and an owner.

stage.name: Send + log
stage.intent: Ship the report and store it for audit.

tasks.task: Send via the canonical channel (email / Slack / portal)
File the report in the client + internal archive
Tag any decisions into the decision log

stage.decision-gate: Required: report sent same day, archived same day.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content write-the-weekly-client-status-report-p4-leadership-update-p6 --format md, agent: faion get-content write-the-weekly-client-status-report-p4-leadership-update-p6 --format context, json: faion get-content write-the-weekly-client-status-report-p4-leadership-update-p6 --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
